name: Raspberry Pretzel Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed pretzels, sugar, and butter. Pat into a 9x13 inch pan.
2. Bake at 400 degrees for 7 minutes. Let cool.
3. Carefully fold cream cheese to Cool Whip and spread on top of pretzel layer.
4. Mix the Jello and water; stir in frozen raspberries.
5. Pour over second layer.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
